chapter_title.en: Chapter on Those Who Have No Blood Money in Cases of Injury or

text: 5189 - وَ رَوَى حَمَّادٌ عَنِ اَلْحَلَبِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ: "أَيُّمَا رَجُلٍ عَدَا عَلَى رَجُلٍ لِيَضْرِبَهُ فَدَفَعَهُ عَنْ نَفْسِهِ فَجَرَحَهُ أَوْ قَتَلَهُ فَلاَ شَيْءَ عَلَيْهِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5189 - Hammad narrated from Al-Halabi from Abu Abdullah (as), who said:
"If any man attacks another man to strike him, and the latter defends himself and injures or kills the attacker, then there is nothing upon him (no liability)."
